ddls:
CREATE TABLE "election_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the election category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the election category */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the category is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year for which election data is available */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the year is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the year was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election category */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "vote_percentage" REAL /* Vote percentage for the category in the given year */,
  "total_votes_cast" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who actually voted */,
  "winning_party" TEXT /* Name of the winning party */,
  "runner_up_party" TEXT /* Name of the runner-up party */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES election_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES election_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election category */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES election_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES election_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the report was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being collaborated on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the collaboration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
